_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Using this preclinical paradigm, four weeks of Rolipram resulted in tumor regression as measured by a restoration of optic nerve volumes to near normal values (Figure 5B, C).
details: Four weeks of Rolipram treatment resulted in tumor regression with restoration of optic nerve volumes to near normal values
